title: The Christmas Child
content:
"Little one, who straight hast come
    Down the heavenly stair,
    Tell us all about your home,
    And the father there."

    "He is such a one as I,
    Like as like can be.
    Do his will, and, by and by,
    Home and him you'll see."
meaning:
About: George MacDonald was a Scottish author, poet, and Christian minister.

Though no longer well known, his works have inspired admiration in such notables as W. H. Auden, J. R. R. Tolkien, and Madeleine L'Engle. For instance C. S. Lewis wrote that he regarded MacDonald as his "master".
